sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check player position
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
blue_player = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'b' and n['pixels'] == 24]
print(f"Player position: {blue_player[0]['boundary']}")

# Check area to the right of player
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
p = blue_player[0]['boundary']
r_min, r_max = p[0][0], p[2][0]
c_min, c_max = p[0][1], p[2][1]
print(f"\nPlayer area (rows {r_min-1}-{r_max+1}, cols {c_min-1}-{c_max+5}):")
for i in range(max(0, r_min-1), min(63, r_max+2)):
    print(f"{i:2d}: {ascii_lines[i][max(0,c_min-1):min(64,c_max+5)]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
